articles.title: Covid era gave Arteta space to revive Arsenal, says Kroenke
articles.description: Arsenal co-chair Josh Kroenke says behind-closed-doors football during the Covid-19 pandemic allowed manager Mikel Arteta "space" help revive the "sleeping giant".
